item.title: Scaffold 1.3.0
item.description:
## Scaffold v1.3.0
### What's New - Release v1.3.0 - Release v1.2.0 - Release v1.1.1 - Release v1.1.0 - Release v1.1.0 - Release v1.0.9 - Release v1.0.8 - Release v1.0.7 - Release v1.0.6 - Release v1.0.5 - Ignore releases/ folder from git - Release v1.0.4 - Release v1.0.4 - Release v1.0.4 - Release v1.0.4 - Release v1.0.4 - Release v1.0.4 - Initial Commit - Update CHANGELOG.md - v1.0.3 — changelog and version bump
